title: Upstart Holdings, Inc. (UPST) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Upstart Holdings came out with quarterly earnings of $0.30 per share, missing the consensus estimate of $0.39 per share. This quarterly report represents an earnings surprise of -22.42%. However, the company posted revenues of $308.21 million for the quarter ended March 2026, surpassing the consensus estimate by 6.52%. Upstart's first quarter saw strong top-line growth, but market reacted negatively due to profitability shortfalls. Upstart currently trades at lower levels following the earnings announcement. Looking ahead, analysts will monitor progress in improving margins for auto and home loan products, the pace at which operating expenses moderate and profitability improves, and milestones in the regulatory review process for Upstart's national bank charter application. Despite the earnings miss, Upstart delivered strong origination and revenue growth across its product suite in Q1 2026.
